issues.description: Target should specify 'up to 2' characters, but current DSL uses ChooseOpponentCharacter without a quantity limit. Should be {"scope":"ChooseOpponentCharacter","quantity":2,"quantityModifier":"UpTo"}
Duration should be "DuringYourTurn" not "EndOfTurn". Card text says 'during this turn' which means the effect lasts for the remainder of your turn, not until end of turn.
